title: 1985 Horsetooth Mini Classic,  Boys 10 - 11 Team Awards Ceremony

enrichment.summary: An announcer at the 1985 Horsetooth Mini Classic presents first place team awards in the 10-11 year old boys category to the Wood Street Pillar/Builders team with 800-plus points, naming team members including Kyle Jones, Eric Owen, and Ray Brown. This is a replayed historical recording of the ceremony, not Kyle speaking.
enrichment.speaker: other

transcript.text: And our first place team winner, 10 and 11 year old boys,
Goes to Wood Street Builders with a total of 801 points.
Wood Street Builders team members, Eric Owen, Kyle Towns, and Ray Brown.
Okay guys, victory will all of you.
Don't hit this, just stay on it.
Congratulations to all these young and young men.
